subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-19 in London
subcodes.first_line: If one can content oneself with vegetables for one's sustenance, this would be preferable, for the food of humanity consists in vegetables
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر انسان بتواند در غذا به نباتات قناعت کند بهتر است زیرا خوراک انسان نباتست
subcodes.subjects: @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @unity in diversity, @consumption of meat; vegetarianism; diet, @literal interpretation, @kindness to and rights of animals
